notes: RC evidence bundle for v0.5.0-rc.1. Delivers the full v0.5.x operational maturity release: end-user self-service portal, audit log visibility, data export and retention workflows, carrier health dashboard, and broader lifecycle consistency across PBX objects. FreeSWITCH smoke run 26993419772 passed on rc/v0.5.0 at 6df5fab (enlogy@10.0.0.32). DB migrations 0053 and 0054 applied cleanly. All CI gates pass on same commit.

v0_5_operational_maturity_evidence.bucket_1_end_user_portal: End-user self-service portal at /user/self-service: voicemail inbox (play/download/delete), call history, registered devices/SIP credentials, DND toggle, and call-forward management. SELF_SERVICE_* capability group added to tenant policy. Full integration test coverage. Closes issue #224. Merged in c1c4fce.
v0_5_operational_maturity_evidence.bucket_2_evidence_visibility: Operator-facing audit log page at /tenant/audit with level/category/target filters, time-range selector, and paginated results. Surfaces lifecycle events (publish, rollback, approve, reject) and configuration changes. Closes issue #225. Merged in c1c4fce.
v0_5_operational_maturity_evidence.bucket_3_retention_export: Data export page at /tenant/export with CDR, recording, and voicemail exports (CSV/ZIP/JSON). Export-before-delete guidance for operators. Media storage lifecycle visibility. Closes issue #226. Merged in c1c4fce.
v0_5_operational_maturity_evidence.bucket_4_carrier_health: Carrier health page at /tenant/integrations/carrier-health with per-trunk REGED/DOWN/TRYING/FAILED status, SIP response code breakdown, registration latency summary, and carrier-template link. Closes issue #227. Merged in c1c4fce.
v0_5_operational_maturity_evidence.bucket_5_lifecycle_consistency: Outbound route draft/publish lifecycle: DB migration 0054 adds draft status; POST /outbound-routes/:id/publish endpoint; start_as_draft on create; 7 new service-layer tests. Active-call safety checks: parking-lot delete confirm with parked-call count; conference-room disable/delete confirm with active participant count. Closes issue #228. Merged in 6df5fab.
v0_5_operational_maturity_evidence.planning_queue_closed: All 5 v0.5.x delivery buckets marked shipped in release-buckets-v0.4-v0.6.md. Closes tracking issue #229.

helm_lint: PASSED on enlogy@10.0.0.32 at commit 6df5fab (rc/v0.5.0). 1 chart linted, 0 chart(s) failed. All 8 resource kinds render (Secret, ConfigMap, PVC, Service, Deployment×3, Job).
docker_compose_prod_smoke: PASSED on enlogy@10.0.0.32 with image at commit 6df5fab (rc/v0.5.0). /health returned db:ok, /setup returned HTTP 200.

rotation_rehearsal.note: Automated precondition checks pass. Full live secret rotation requires a production deployment with rotating secrets.

migrations: v0.5.0 includes 2 new migrations: 0053_self_service_policy_extensions.sql (end-user capability policy columns) and 0054_outbound_routes_draft_lifecycle.sql (draft status for outbound_routes). Both apply cleanly on top of v0.4.0 schema.
production_soak: Inherited from v0.3.0. No call-path or hot-path changes in v0.5.0. All v0.5 changes affect admin/end-user UI surfaces and audit-log-adjacent API endpoints.
production_slo: Inherited from v0.3.0 (docs/ops/runtime-slo-evidence-2026-06-03.json). No hot-path changes in v0.5.0.
carrier_interop: Inherited from v0.3.0 (docs/ops/carrier-interop-evidence-fusionpbx-2026-06-02.json). No call-path changes in v0.5.0.
security_review: CodeQL run 26993406195 clean. FreeSWITCH hardening 0 findings (smoke run 26993419772). Branch coverage 80.35% (above 80% threshold). No new privileged API surfaces introduced. Self-service endpoints are capability-gated and tenant-scoped.
rollback_plan: Roll back to v0.4.0 image. Run db:migrate in reverse for 0054 (remove draft constraint) and 0053 (remove policy columns). Low data risk — no call-path schema changes.

operator_signoff.name: Fatih Kucukpetek
operator_signoff.notes: RC signoff for v0.5.0-rc.1. All 5 v0.5.x operational maturity buckets delivered. FreeSWITCH smoke, CI, CodeQL, coverage, and Docker builds all pass on enlogy@10.0.0.32 at 6df5fab. Live rotation rehearsal remains as a gate before production promotion.

known_gaps_before_production: Live rotation rehearsal (pnpm rotation:rehearsal) — not just --check-config
GHCR package visibility must be set to Public before using GHCR images in production
pnpm db:migrate must be run on the production DB to apply migrations 0053 and 0054
